title: Nika Turns the Battle
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Kizaru, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Five Elders as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll be dead either way... this is it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the?! How?! That was a freaking laser!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Light doesn't hold a candle to love!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that's true, they'll have to scrap the physics books and start from scratch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Let's go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: to the Northeast port!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well... I'm in a real pickle now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll expect me to at least bring back your heads after all this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'd better start drafting an apology letter for them then!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, well... it's not everyday you see one of the five elders down in the dirt.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My my look at you, just what kind of delicious power do you have? Muhu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu Hu

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think an elder would come down to the surface and bless us with his presence, it's unheard of...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it sure made our job a helluva lot easier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Tay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Mission Complete!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What business do you have here???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gatarina Devon... I'm surprised a level 6 escape, like you, would choose the life of a subordinate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Heh heh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Teach is special.

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
